title: Explain why ChannelCase does not automatically handle sandbox
prompt: Write `docs/channel_case_sandbox.md` explaining that `MyAppWeb.ChannelCase` alone is NOT sufficient for sandbox propagation — each channel must explicitly call `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow/2` at the start of its `join/3`. The doc must state: (1) ChannelCase checks out the sandbox for the TEST process, (2) the CHANNEL process is a different pid and is not automatically granted access, (3) the fix is the allow call in join/3.
tier_rationale: Reference documentation. Sonnet produces the explanation when prompted with explicit points.
